title: Run Viewer, Community Meta, Shareable Runs, Game-Accurate Colors
features: Run Viewer — paste .run file JSON to view detailed run breakdowns with floor-by-floor history, card choices, HP tracking
Shareable Runs — analyzed runs get a permanent URL (/runs/{hash}) for sharing with others
Community Meta page — aggregated stats from submitted runs: win rates by character, card pick rates, deadliest encounters
Meta filters — filter stats by character, win/loss/abandoned, ascension level, game mode, single/multiplayer
Meta charts — win/loss pie chart, character win rate bars, pick rate bars, ascension distribution (recharts)
Card stats table with chart/table toggle, sortable by pick rate, offered, in decks, in wins
Custom Mode modifiers page — all 16 modifiers with deck replacement tags, Neow interaction notes
Game-accurate color palette — character colors sampled from energy icons, backgrounds from main menu atmosphere
Hi-res character select screen renders (2048px, all 5 characters)
Card/relic hover tooltips on run viewer and community stats
Ko-Fi donation banner and footer link
Ancient relic pool condition text improved (Darv's Pandora's Box)
fixes: Fixed false X-cost flag on Bullet Time, All for One, Scrape, Transfigure
Fixed Spur+ upgrade showing 7 instead of 5 (cascading replacement bug)
Fixed Pael's Claw/Growth missing enchantment names (Goopy/Clone)
Fixed main menu render artifacts (hidden Layer 53, blue gradient, water texture slots)
Fixed meta page crash on empty filter results
Fixed share button not appearing for duplicate run submissions
api_changes: POST /api/runs — submit run data for community stats (SQLite storage)
GET /api/runs/shared/{hash} — retrieve a shared run by hash
GET /api/runs/stats — community stats with character, win, ascension, game_mode, players filters
